For the travel lovers…

Welcome ! You’re at the right boarding gate !

For the travel lovers…

For the personal growth seekers…

For those who dream of travelling to every corner of the world...

Welcome ! You’re at the right boarding gate !

However, in between your dream and where you are now, have you ever felt “stuck”—because you…

  • Feel restricted by the mundane routine of daily life, but unsure of how to travel more without creating major life disruptions

  • Worry about the financial burden of travelling despite its enriching potential—viewing it as an "additional cost" on top of your other expenses

  • Have consumed self-help books, TED talks or personal development courses, yet still not achieving the progress you desire

  • Enjoy solo travels but sometimes not sure how to navigate cultural gaps or build meaningful connections

If any of the above had you nodding your head, thinking “yeah, that’s me”—buckle up and read on, because you’re not alone!

I’m so excited to share this game-changing blueprint with you, so you don’t need to go through ANY of these frustrations or worries.

(or if you’ve already been through it, you’re going to see how to get OUT of it!)

The alternative I’m offering you here is:

ENROL IN THE COURSE HERE

The Travel Mastery Blueprint will take you by hand, and lead you from the inside-out to the

freedom, fulfillment, and success you’ve been yearning for…

…and the kind of global lifestyle you know you deserve (even if you feel uncomfortable saying it out).

This Course is For You If You’re:

  • Eager to travel more freely, frequently and meaningfully…

  • A growth-minded person who'd like to take your travel experience & impact to the next level

  • Tired of superficial one-off trips only and sense there are deeper, more meaningful experiences to be had, but don't know how to make that happen

  • Aspired to become a global citizen and live an extraordinary life beyond ordinary boundaries... (whether with a nomadic style or not)

If this is YOU, I’d LOVE to personally be your co-pilot, showing you how to

transform your life on your future travels—starting TODAY.

Infinite Loop Card Slider
I'M IN! I WANT TO LEVEL UP!

By the End of This Programme, You Will:

1. Integrate travel seamlessly into your lifestyle, moving beyond one-off trips to continuous journeys that fit with your personal circumstances

2. Master your finance & logistics of travels smartly and sustainably, so you can gain the freedom to travel more without burden

3. Gain the confidence & skills to navigate cultural gaps with ease, and be able to create meaningful connections wherever you go

4. Achieve measurable, tangible results in your personal transformation beyond what traditional self-help books or courses could offer

5. Unlock the transformative power of travel, knowing exactly how to use travel as a dynamic tool for self discovery & global engagement

6. Be able to transform any fears on your journeys, by developing a global mindset, building resilience and learning practical tools

7. Create a conscious global citizen life that fits into your day-to-day, regardless of your current level of travels, occupation or responsibilities

8. Turn each new journey into a stepping stone towards greater achievements, elevating your personal & professional growth

I'M IN! I WANT TO LEVEL UP!

Just Imagine the Difference:

FROM SUCCESS BY CHANCE, TO SUCCESS BY DESIGN…

Even though it might not seem like it, it’s actually never been easier to travel with ease, joy, and purpose in our modern world today!

Imagine waking up every day feeling aligned and living a limitless, joyful life without worries, with the freedom to travel whenever you desire.

Because of this new clarity, you get to spend more time actually enjoying your travels & building meaningful connections, while spending less time worrying about the finances or logistics.

What would it feel like to know that every trip becomes your best yet, transforming your personal life, enriching your professional growth, and elevating all dimensions of your life holistically

And YES—this works whether you’re solo travelling, travelling with friends / family, or moving abroad.

This works whether you’re in a full-time job, a nomad, or a student. This works no matter where you're from or what skin colour you have!

Just Imagine the Difference:

FROM SUCCESS BY CHANCE, TO SUCCESS BY DESIGN…

Even though it might not seem like it, it’s actually never been easier to travel with ease, joy, and purpose in our modern world today!

Imagine waking up every day feeling aligned and living a limitless, joyful life without worries, with the freedom to travel whenever you desire.

Because of this new clarity, you get to spend more time actually enjoying your travels & building meaningful connections, while spending less time worrying about the finances or logistics.

What would it feel like to know that every trip becomes your best yet, transforming your personal life, enriching your professional growth, and elevating all dimensions of your life holistically

And YES—this works whether you’re solo travelling, travelling with friends / family, or moving abroad.

This works whether you’re in a full-time job, a nomad, or a student. This works no matter where you're from or what skin colour you have!

There are hundreds of growth-minded individuals I’ve already helped—regardless how much they had travelled—who are now purposefully travelling while making the global impacts they dreamed of.

While learning from my decade of travels through (painful) trial & error, and working with these new global citizens... I’ve discovered one clear lesson—there is a proven method for creating this life FASTER.

It’s learnable and you can master travelling by crafting your own blueprint too. 

And, I’m going to show you exactly how to make all of this happen for yourself... even if it feels intimidating, or even “impossible” right now.

But first…

Let me tell you a little more about how I know this works, and WHY I do what I do.

There are hundreds of growth-minded individuals I’ve already helped—regardless how much they had travelled—who are now purposefully travelling while making the global impacts they dreamed of.

While learning from my decade of travels through (painful) trial & error, and working with these new global citizens... I’ve discovered one clear lesson—there is a proven method for creating this life FASTER.

It’s learnable and you can master travelling by crafting your own blueprint too. 

And, I’m going to show you exactly how to make all of this happen for yourself... even if it feels intimidating, or even “impossible” right now.

But first…

Let me tell you a little more about how I know this works, and WHY I do what I do.

Meet Freeman!

Hello, You Beautiful People! ✈️🌏❤️

I’m an international speaker, bestselling author & certified life coach, who also shares the dream of exploring every corner of the world in this life!

Originally from Hong Kong, I left home solo at age 19 to live in Romania for a Global Village project. What began as an escape from my struggling, mundane life evolved into a transformative journey across more than 35 countries over a decade (& still counting!), shaping me into a thriving global citizen.

  • Presented & Taught on Global Stages at TEDx, Mindvalley, UNTWO & more...

  • Author & Co-author of 3 Amazon Bestselling Books

  • Coaching World-Record-Breaking Athlete & 6-Figure Global Entrepreneurs

  • 8+ Years of Professional Experience in the Tourism Industry

  • Bachelor’s Degree from SHTM (The World’s #1 Ranked Hotel & Tourism Management School)

I’m on a mission to awaken more world citizens and make our world a better place through personal transformations.

I’ve been passionate about personal development for 15+ years. I’m even more passionate about empowering YOU to unlock profound freedom by transforming both your inner & outer journeys.

I'M READY! COUNT ME IN TOO

I'M READY! COUNT ME IN TOO

Here’s The Plan…

❌ I do NOT offer a cookie-cutter approach to crafting a successful global life. I do not want you to travel just like everyone else, thinking you have to replicate someone else’s journey to achieve success.

🛠 Instead, this blueprint will offer you tools, frameworks, and guidance to help you find your answers from within, craft your powerful goals, and empower you on this lifelong journey. I'll give you an invitation to break the rules ;)

🌟 I want you to live in your authentic desire. To explore the world in a way that aligns with your inner values, supports your personal growth, and makes positive impacts on the world.

Here’s The Plan…

❌ I do NOT offer a cookie-cutter approach to crafting a successful global life. I do not want you to travel just like everyone else, thinking you have to replicate someone else’s journey to achieve success.

🛠 Instead, this blueprint will offer you tools, frameworks, and guidance to help you find your answers from within, craft your powerful goals, and empower you on this lifelong journey. I'll give you an invitation to break the rules ;)

🌟 I want you to live in your authentic desire. To explore the world in a way that aligns with your inner values, supports your personal growth, and makes positive impacts on the world.

Here’s What You’ll Learn :

Module 1: Transform Your Global Mindset

Everything you need to know about global mindset & travel mastery fundamentals, so you can create fast success for your journey:

✔ Learn & apply the 4 Stages of Travellers (The Modern Map of Consciousness)
✔ How to access the transformative power of travelling and break free from travel limits
✔ Create the simple 6 Transformational Shifts for accelerated results
✔ Align your mind, body, and spirit for a balanced, long-term journey
✔ Master The T.R.A.V.E.L. Framework to thrive as a global citizen

Module 2: Refine Your Inner Travels

Unlock the secrets to deep inner growth that will naturally elevate every of your travel experience:

✔ Gain radical self-awareness and free the authentic traveller inside you
✔ Map out your “travel-spiration” that will fuel your lifelong goals & passions
✔ Acquire your inner compass so you can navigate life & travels with clarity
✔ Learn to recalibrate your inner compass with self-development tools that actually work
✔ Discover your roadmap to mastery for intentional, purposeful travels
✔ How to “have it all”—enjoy your travels through the full spectrum of human experience

Module 3: Integrate Your Outer Travels

Leverage powerful frameworks & practical strategies to effectively and seamlessly optimise your travel explorations:

✔ Rewire your money blueprint to maximise financial freedom on the road
✔ Navigate cultural gaps like a Jedi & build meaningful connections wherever you go
✔ A.C.E. your travel health & wellbeing for an energised travel lifestyle
✔ Upgrade your logistics with E.A.S.E. for efficient modern travelling
✔ Globetrotting with a "super-map" that'll naturally grow your worldviews
✔ How to integrate your inner travels with the 5 Pillars of Outer Travel Mastery

Module 4: Purpose-driven Journeys

Learn how to craft purposeful, impactful, and joyful travel journeys that align with your personal calling:

✔ Hack the 3 Levels of Change (that top performers use) to create rapid, transformative growth
✔ Unlock the essence of mindful travel for deeper, enriching experiences
✔ Get your “passport to becoming unstoppable”—mastering the art of transforming any fears
✔ How to chart your journey for lifetime success with The Ultimate Game Plan
✔ Enjoy lifetime access & updates to bonus travel resources and industry expert interviews
✔ Celebrate your achievements and stay connected with a supportive community

The Time Is Now

The game has changed—out of the whole human history,
it's never been more accessible to claim your path as a global citizen and shape a life of meaningful adventures.

Why waste this gift? What's the worst thing that happens when you take a chance on yourself? You too are capable of creating the dream life you want, without compromising your ideals or feeling overwhelmed.

It's easier than most people expect. It’s NOT rocket science.

It’s about Awareness, Empowerment, & Commitment.

What’s Included?

When you enrol in Travel Mastery Blueprint you’ll get LIFETIME access to:

  • On-demand over 9 hours of pre-recorded trainings on travel mastery led by Freeman

  • Professionally edited training videos: Enjoy high-quality, engaging content that enhances your time spend in learning

  • Daily take-home exercises to integrate and take actions on the material so you can see real-world changes

  • Online self-paced learning from the comfort of your own home (pants optional), or on your mobile digital devices anywhere

  • Bonus exclusive interviews with travel experts, featuring bonus training on digital nomadism, traveling with kids, and optimising travel even if you think you're not fit enough.

  • Bonus digital copy of the bestselling book Travel to Transform: Awaken the Global Citizen in You and Thrive in the Modern World

Here’re Our Promises:

Master travelling can profoundly elevate the quality of your life.

Look, you don’t need to be an expert to get started. You just need to start.

Because if you continue doing what you’ve been doing, or thinking this could wait, where will that take you?

And I personally know what it's like to feel like a wanderlust trapped by “real-world reality”…

That’s why I created this program: so you can reconnect with your deep desires, unleash the explorer within you, and get a foolproof plan that will take you from dreaming about adventures to actually living them within the next three months.

BUT… I do understand that sometimes making this kind of life-changing decision is a big deal.

That’s why I want you to feel totally at ease when making this decision to join us in the Travel Mastery Blueprint—with a 100% money back guarantee.

I can confidently say that, because we’ve worked with hundreds of aspiring global citizens who were starting from scratch and within a few months they found their inner compass, ignited their travel-spiration, and embarked on their authentic path of travelling & transformation.

Making Your Travel Dreams Come True is Closer Than You Think!

I WANT TO CLAIM MINE! I'M IN!

FAQs

1) I don't get to travel often at the moment. Will this course still be beneficial for me?

Absolutely! If you’re feeling that creating a global life sounds too far-fetched from your current reality… I’ve been there too! The key to travel mastery isn't about how many countries you get to visit, but your awareness and relationship with travel.

This course provides you with the tools, mindset, and action plan to transform your travel experiences and equip you for a global lifestyle, regardless of how often you travel.

It's worth mentioning that many students find they travel more frequently after completing this course because they take actual steps to implement the blueprint they create, which works with their current financial or personal responsibilities. Everyone is capable of mastering travel in the modern world today. Even though it's seldom taught in traditional education, it's a learnable skill!

2) Why a Blueprint? Why is this different from other traditional personal growth courses?

You might even wonder, "Do I really need this course to learn about travelling?" or "Why can't I just follow what travel influencers do?" The problem is—no one knows your dreams like you do!

Travelling without clear intentions is like flying a plane without a GPS. Sure, the view might be great, but does that truly take you to where you want to be?

That's why the key is to build your journeys from the inside-out, ensuring you reach your personal travel goals authentically! Unlike traditional cookie-cutter self-development courses, this TMB quest is tailored to help you discover your own greatness & strengths and achieve your unique travel aspirations.

Investing in yourself gives you more time and clarity, so you can spend more time actually enjoying your travels and building meaningful connections while spending less time on trial & error!

3) How is this course delivered?

The course is delivered entirely online, giving you the flexibility to start anytime and access the materials from anywhere in the world. You can pause, speed up, or rewatch the training to fit your schedule.

While designed as a 21-day program with daily exercises in bite-size formats (total 9+ hours of on-demand training), feel free to go at your own pace. You also own this programme for a lifetime, allowing you to rely on the resource-based lessons during your travels and update your blueprint anytime you're ready to unleash your next level of travel mastery.

If you need support, feel free to email [email protected].

4) Does it mean I have to live a full-time nomad lifestyle?

Absolutely not! TMB is about authentic travel and creating a travel blueprint that works for YOU holistically. You could be working full-time or have other commitments. Ultimately, the course integrates travel as a meaningful part of your life, regardless of your lifestyle.

Even in my own decade of travel, I wasn't living a nomadic lifestyle most of the time. Different life stages bring different opportunities, but clarity on travel mastery guides me.

That said, if after going through the course you feel inspired to pursue a nomadic lifestyle because that aligns with your inner values, rest assured we have resources to guide you in making that dream a reality too. This includes expert bonus interview, such as with Markos Korvesis, Co-Founder of Nomad365 and Head Career Coach of LeadCompass, where you'll learn the strategies, options, and actionable steps to take your next step into digital nomadism.

5) I'm not an experienced traveller. Can beginners take this course?

Definitely! This course is designed for all levels. Whether you're a seasoned traveller or just starting, you'll learn to cultivate your authentic relationship with travel, equip with practical tools to help accelerate your success, and navigate the modern world with confidence.

If you're starting out (congrats!), this course will bring new awareness and clarity, so you know how to use travel to elevate your personal & professional life. If you're already a frequent traveller or living a nomadic lifestyle, this course will take you to the next level of purposeful travel, aligning your mind, body, and spirit, and enhancing your global impact.

6) What if I’m not satisfied with the course?

We’re confident you’ll love the course. However, if for any reason you don’t feel the same, you can request a refund with our 100% money-back guarantee.

To qualify, simply complete and submit the exercises for the first two modules to show you've given the course a fair shot, alongside your purchasing receipt. We offer a refund period up to 180 days after the original payment (120 days for Afterpay payments).

Email [email protected] to request a full refund (excluding any fees or currency conversion charges from your bank).

That said, if after going through the course you feel inspired to pursue a nomadic lifestyle because that aligns with your inner values, rest assured we have resources to guide you in making that dream a reality too. This includes expert bonus interview, such as with Markos Korvesis, Co-Founder of Nomad365 and Head Career Coach of LeadCompass, where you'll learn the strategies, options, and actionable steps to take your next step into digital nomadism.

5) I'm not an experienced traveller. Can beginners take this course?

Definitely! This course is designed for all levels. Whether you're a seasoned traveller or just starting, you'll learn to cultivate your authentic relationship with travel, equip with practical tools to help accelerate your success, and navigate the modern world with confidence.

If you're starting out (congrats!), this course will bring new awareness and clarity, so you know how to use travel to elevate your personal & professional life. If you're already a frequent traveller or living a nomadic lifestyle, this course will take you to the next level of purposeful travel, aligning your mind, body, and spirit, and enhancing your global impact.

6) What if I’m not satisfied with the course?

We’re confident you’ll love the course. However, if for any reason you don’t feel the same, you can request a refund with our 100% money-back guarantee.

To qualify, simply complete and submit the exercises for the first two modules to show you've given the course a fair shot, alongside your purchasing receipt. We offer a refund period up to 180 days after the original payment (120 days for Afterpay payments).

Email [email protected] to request a full refund (excluding any fees or currency conversion charges from your bank).

Still scrolling?

Allow me to sharesome more last words here…

Taking the leap isn't easy, but it's necessary to transcend the ordinary and transform your life from the inside-out.

The Travel Mastery Blueprint is designed for those who are serious about taking the steps to realise their dreams. I often tell my coaching clients, "I may be your golden plane ticket to new heights, but remember, you’re the pilot.”

You are the captain of your own transformation.

In fact, just the act of saying YES to invest in yourself can start to dissolve old stories and limiting beliefs about yourself. It’s a powerful step towards upgrading your future and embracing greater freedom.

As Dr Joe Dispenza eloquently puts it, "If knowledge is power, knowledge of yourself is self-empowerment.” Let this blueprint be your boarding pass to greatness, as I aim for the return on investment for my programmes to be at least 10X in a short time, and hundreds of times over in a lifetime.

So if you feel an exhilarating uncertainty, if a sense of discovery calls to you, or if you feel you're on the edge of something extraordinary—embrace it. It’s a sign that you’re about to make the journey of a lifetime.


Now, if you feel ready, I’ll see you on this flight!

With love & travel-spiration,

I'M READY! TAKE ME TO ENROL
